CustomField.description: This calculates the percentage shipped from Quantity Confirmed and Quantity Shipped
CustomField.formula: if (Quantity_Confirmed__c > 0, Quantity_Shipped__c / Quantity_Confirmed__c , IF(Quantity_Ordered__c >0, Quantity_Shipped__c / Quantity_Ordered__c, 0))
CustomField.label: fxPercentageShipped
